decoys.category_a: Metaphoric ways to cut off from something
decoys.category_b: Items you find in a grocery store (not food)
decoys.reason_a: 'burn a bridge' means to sever a connection
decoys.reason_b: A bridge could be thought of as a physical structure in a store or supermarket.

decoys.category_a: Items you find in a grocery store (not food)
decoys.category_b: Contains a hidden animal in its letters
decoys.reason_a: A cart is a shopping tool
